method: Stratified sample across categories, auth types, credential-access patterns, and low-confidence rows. Manual checks used official docs; Browser Use trigger is provided for repeatable browser verification.

checks.claim: Self-serve CRM API with OAuth/private app token and broad CRM surface.
checks.whatChanged: Updated evidence to latest date-versioned API reference.

checks.claim: OAuth2, bot/user tokens, broad app platform.
checks.whatChanged: Kept classification as easy-win, with scope/app-install caveat.

checks.claim: Marketing API is gated by program/access tiers and ad account roles.
checks.whatChanged: Changed blocker wording from generic app review to Development Tier/Marketing API Program access.

checks.claim: SP-API is buildable but developer registration/approval and AWS signing are blockers.
checks.whatChanged: Kept outreach-needed because access requires seller/developer registration.
Marked as an easy-win with existing MCP proof.

checks.claim: GraphQL support platform API with API-key authentication.
checks.whatChanged: Kept as easy-win but noted GraphQL schema mapping.

checks.claim: Self-serve OAuth app platform with broad Admin APIs.
checks.whatChanged: No change beyond emphasizing app scopes.

checks.claim: Buildable but enterprise/admin-gated because auth and warehouse permissions matter.
API availability and breadth are unclear.
checks.whatChanged: Left low confidence rather than over-claiming Slack-like API breadth.

checks.claim: API is likely available but surface and credential path are unclear.

Separated NotebookLM product from Gemini/Vertex AI APIs; marked needs-review.
